name: Nakhon Nayok retail and civic band
notes: Built-up town band around the provincial center, hospital, municipal functions, and modern retail where destination charging should carry weight.

name: Ongkharak medical and education band
notes: SWU campus and medical-center catchment with staff, student, patient, and visitor demand suited to longer-dwell charging.

name: Route 305 growth axis
notes: Peri-urban connector band where commuter movement, roadside services, and the Pathum Thani-Nakhon Nayok approach overlap.

name: Ban Na - Pak Phli connector
notes: Interior connector between Ban Na, the provincial town side, and Pak Phli, suitable for community-plus-corridor demand rather than pure tourism.
